title: v0.3 UI 改造：创建目标与我的页收口
behavior: 按 docs/design/page/pages/create-goal-page.md 和 docs/design/page/pages/profile-page.md 收口创建目标页与我的页：创建页专注创建 Goal 和触发 Plan 生成，我的页专注目标、偏好、AI 表达与设置。

acceptance.text: 创建目标页使用步骤式卡片组织目标名称、截止日期、每日可用时间、补充说明和个性化安排偏好
个性化偏好默认展开，包含偏好工作时段、当前能量状态、计划强度或仪式感元素；仪式感只影响表达风格，不作为任务安排科学依据
点击生成计划后仍创建 Goal 并触发 PlanBundle 生成和保存；创建页不直接展示任务日历或执行任务
我的页展示当前目标卡、默认安排偏好、AI 表达与仪式感偏好、最近推进和设置入口；有目标时主操作是查看计划/管理目标，无目标时突出创建目标
我的页删除今日任务、任务日历等与 TabBar 重复的强入口；MBTI、塔罗、每日关键词放在 AI 表达偏好中，不作为默认安排硬参数

verify.feature: npm run test -- goal-create user-profile ui-components navigation-shell data-layer

outOfScope: 不新增多目标完整管理
不新增完整塔罗抽牌 UI
不改变 PlanBundle、Goal、UserProfile 的持久化结构

userPath: 无目标 -> 打开我的页 -> 突出创建目标入口
创建目标页填写必填项 -> 生成计划 -> 保存 Goal、UserProfile、PlanBundle 并跳转到计划查看路径
有目标 -> 打开我的页 -> 展示当前目标、进度、偏好和查看计划/管理目标操作
integrationEvidence: tests/goal-create.test.ts 覆盖创建目标、校验、PlanBundle 生成保存路径
tests/user-profile.test.ts 覆盖偏好结构和保存路径
tests/navigation-shell.test.ts 覆盖 TabBar 入口未被破坏
tests/data-layer.test.ts 保持创建目标 -> 计划 -> 今日/日历读取主路径通过
npm.cmd run verify:system 通过，mp-weixin 构建产物生成成功

commands.command: npm.cmd run test -- goal-create user-profile ui-components navigation-shell data-layer
commands.notes: 36 tests passed across goal-create, user-profile, ui-components, navigation-shell, and data-layer; coverage includes step-card create page structure, Goal/UserProfile/PlanBundle persistence, profile page source structure, expression preferences, navigation shell, and data compatibility.
mp-weixin build completed successfully; Sass legacy API warnings only.
Harness gate passed first with F23 active (4 features: 3 passing, 1 active) and then after F23 was marked passing (4 features: 4 passing), with 0 warnings and 0 errors.

evidence.manualSmoke: Source/build smoke for F23: create goal page uses five step cards for title, deadline, daily time, description, and expanded personalized preferences; preferences include work style, energy, ritual expression, and optional MBTI; ritual and MBTI copy stays limited to expression, not scheduling science. Generate plan still saves Goal, UserProfile, PlanBundle, and legacy DailyPlan[] and routes to calendar without rendering task/calendar views. Profile page shows current goal, default scheduling preferences, AI expression and ritual preferences, recent progress, and settings entries; with a goal it offers view plan/manage goal, without a goal it highlights create goal, and it does not restore today/calendar hub entries.
evidence.notes: F23 keeps PlanBundle, Goal, UserProfile, storage keys, planner, replanner, AI, and tarot persistence contracts unchanged. The manage goal and settings entries are lightweight placeholders within the existing MVP boundary.
